---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a feature, an improvement, or a device/GPU to support
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What would you like?**
A clear description of the feature or improvement.

**Why / use case**
What does this enable? Who benefits?

**Area**
Controls / rendering / audio / multiplayer / packaging / GPU support / performance / other

**Device (if GPU/compatibility related)**
- Model:
- SoC / GPU:
- Android version:

**Anything else**
Mockups, links to how other C&C engine ports do it, or notes from `docs/fixes/` that seem
relevant. Please DO NOT attach or link any game data (`.big`, `.bik`, maps).
